description: Client need spans housing, food, and healthcare. Analyzer should pick a primary and surface at least two secondary categories.

qaPairs.question: How would you like us to reach you?
What kind of help do you need?
qaPairs.answer: I'm behind on rent, can't afford groceries, and I'm out of my diabetes medication

qaPairs.question: Is this urgent?
qaPairs.answer: I think so, all of it is piling up at the same time

qaPairs.question: Tell me about your situation.
qaPairs.answer: Lost hours at work two months back. Behind on rent, fridge is mostly empty, and I ran out of my insulin last week and can't afford the refill. Trying to figure out where to start.
